American Restaurants in Sanford

The cleanest of Sanford's american restaurants is CHEDDAR'S CASUAL CAFE, a perfect 100/100 at its last inspection. Here are all 13, each graded A–F so you can compare the kitchen, not just the menu.

13 american restaurants

  • A 100 C
